briefdescription.para: Property: Indicates whether the dataset is Monte Carlo (MC) simulation (true) or real data (false).
Property: Indicates whether the required metadata was successfully found and loaded.
Property: The number of events in the dataset or a specific file.
Property: An index related to events, possibly for iteration or identification.
Property: The total size of the dataset, potentially in bytes or some other unit.
Property: The k-factor, a theoretical correction factor used in physics calculations.
Property: The center-of-mass energy of the collision (e.g., in GeV or TeV).
Property: The generator filter efficiency for MC simulations.
Property: A measure of the dataset's processing completion, if applicable.
Property: The energy of the colliding beams.
Property: The physics process cross-section in nanobarns (nb).
Property: The physics process cross-section in femtobarns (fb).
Property: The physics process cross-section in picobarns (pb).
Property: The integrated luminosity of the data-taking campaign.
Property: The sum of event weights, crucial for MC normalization.
Property: The Dataset Identifier (DSID), a unique number for the dataset.
Property: The number of files associated with this dataset.
Property: The total number of events across all files in the dataset.
Property: Another numerical identifier for the dataset, possibly synonymous with DSID.
Property: The format of the derived data (e.g., DAOD_PHYS).
Property: The AMI (ATLAS Metadata Interface) tag for the dataset.
Property: Information about the Monte Carlo event generators used.
Property: A generic string identifier for the metadata or dataset.
Property: The human-readable name of the dataset.
Property: The status of the dataset in the production system.
Property: The type of data (e.g., "mc", "data").
Property: Version string for the dataset or metadata schema.
Property: Information about the Parton Density Function (PDF) used in MC generation.
Property: The ATLAS software release version used for processing.
Property: The main physics group associated with this dataset (e.g., "SM", "SUSY").
Property: A short description of the physics process or analysis.
Property: The specific name of the MC event generator.
Property: The version of the detector geometry simulation used.
Property: The tag for the detector conditions database.
Property: The specific tune (parameter set) of the MC generator.
Property: The status of the dataset in the AMI catalog.
Property: The type of colliding beams (e.g., "pp", "PbPb").
Property: The step in the data production chain (e.g., "recon", "merge").
Property: The name of the project this dataset belongs to (e.g., "mc16_13TeV").
Property: Algorithm used for statistical combination or analysis.
Property: Names of any generator-level filters applied.
Property: The type of the file (e.g., "ROOT", "HDF5").
Property: A user-defined name for the sample.
Property: The Logical Dataset Name (LFN) as used in grid systems.
Property: The data-taking or simulation campaign (e.g., "mc16a", "Run2").
Property: A list of keywords associated with the dataset.
Property: A list of weight names or definitions.
Property: (Possibly redundant with 'keywords') A list of keywords.
Property: A list of Globally Unique Identifiers (GUIDs) for the files.
Property: A list of event counts, possibly per file or run.
Property: A list of run numbers.
Property: A list of file sizes.
Property: A map defining input ranges, possibly for event processing.
Property: A map linking an index to input file names/paths.
Property: A map from Logical File Names (LFNs) to an integer (e.g., count or index).
Property: A map for miscellaneous weights or related information, using weights_t struct.
Property: A map for general configuration settings as key-value string pairs.
< Private access specifier for the following members.

detaileddescription.para: Pointer to a RapidJSON document object, used for parsing JSON metadata. Initialized to nullptr.

briefdescription.para: String storing the path to a metadata cache, if used.
Instance of meta_t struct, likely holding the raw or processed metadata values.
Pointer to a vector of folds_t structures, possibly for k-fold data. Initialized to nullptr.
Declares the analysis class as a friend, allowing it to access private members of meta.
< Public access specifier for the following members.

detaileddescription.para: Constructor for the meta class. Initializes a new instance of the meta class.

briefdescription.para: Destructor for the meta class.

detaileddescription.para: Cleans up resources used by the meta instance, such as the RapidJSON document.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves tags based on a hash.

parameterdescription.para: The hash string used to identify and retrieve the specific set of tags.

simplesect.para: A constant pointer to a folds_t structure containing the tags, or nullptr if not found.

briefdescription.para: Scans data from a generic ROOT object (e.g., TTree, TH1).

detaileddescription.para:
This method is likely used to extract metadata embedded within ROOT objects.
obj
Pointer to the ROOT TObject to scan for metadata.

briefdescription.para: Scans sum of weights (SoW) information from a ROOT object.

detaileddescription.para:
This is often important for normalizing Monte Carlo simulations.
obj
Pointer to the ROOT TObject to scan for sum of weights information.

briefdescription.para: Parses a JSON string to extract metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The JSON string containing metadata to be parsed.

briefdescription.para: Generates a hash for a given filename.

detaileddescription.para:
This hash can be used for caching or uniquely identifying file-specific metadata.
fname
The filename (or path) for which to generate the hash.
The generated hash string.

briefdescription.para: Splits a string into a vector of substrings based on a delimiter.

parameterdescription.para: The input string to split.
The delimiter.

briefdescription.para: Removes whitespace from the beginning and end of a string.

parameterdescription.para: The string to trim.

briefdescription.para: Gets the type name of a variable as a string (for debugging).

parameterdescription.para: The type to get the name of.

simplesect.para: The name of the type as a string.

inbodydescription.para: < Gets the type name via RTTI.
< Returns the type name.

briefdescription.para: Sums the elements of a vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of elements in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to sum.

inbodydescription.para: < Initialize the output variable.
< Return the sum.

briefdescription.para: Sets the prefix used in log messages from this instance.

parameterdescription.para: The string to use as a prefix for log messages.

briefdescription.para: Returns the prefix currently used in log messages.
Outputs an info message.

parameterdescription.para: The message to output.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Outputs a warning message.

parameterdescription.para: The warning message to output.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Outputs an error message.

parameterdescription.para: The error message to output.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Outputs a debug message (only in debug mode).

parameterdescription.para: The debug message to output.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Outputs a message with custom formatting.

parameterdescription.para: The message to output.
A custom tag to prepend to the message.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Enables or disables debug mode.

parameterdescription.para: Boolean flag, set to true to enable debug messages, false to disable.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current status of debug mode.

simplesect.para: Boolean indicating whether debug mode is enabled (true) or disabled (false).

briefdescription.para: Sets whether warnings should be suppressed.

parameterdescription.para: Boolean flag, set to true to suppress warnings, false to show them.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current warning suppression status.

simplesect.para: Boolean indicating whether warnings are suppressed (true) or shown (false).

briefdescription.para: Sets whether info messages should be suppressed.

parameterdescription.para: Boolean flag, set to true to suppress info messages, false to show them.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current info message suppression status.

simplesect.para: Boolean indicating whether info messages are suppressed (true) or shown (false).

briefdescription.para: Internal method to compile or process metadata after parsing.

detaileddescription.para: This might involve organizing, validating, or transforming the raw metadata.

briefdescription.para: Parses a float value from a TTree based on a key.

parameterdescription.para: The key (branch/leaf name) to look for in the TTree.
Pointer to the TTree to parse from.

simplesect.para: The parsed float value. Returns 0 if not found or on error.

briefdescription.para: Parses a string value from a TTree based on a key.

parameterdescription.para: The key (branch/leaf name) to look for in the TTree.
Pointer to the TTree to parse from.

simplesect.para: The parsed string value. Returns empty string if not found or on error.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the isMC property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved boolean value.
Pointer to the meta instance from which to get the value.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the found property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved boolean value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the eventNumber property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the totalSize property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the event_index property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the kfactor property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the ecmEnergy property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the genFiltEff property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the completion property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the beam_energy property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the cross_section_pb property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value (picobarns).
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the cross_section_nb property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value (nanobarns).
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the cross_section_fb property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value (femtobarns).
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the campaign_luminosity property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the dsid property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved unsigned int value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the nFiles property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved unsigned int value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the totalEvents property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved unsigned int value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the datasetNumber property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved unsigned int value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the derivationFormat property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the AMITag property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the generators property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the identifier property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the DatasetName property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the prodsysStatus property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the dataType property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the version property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the PDF property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the AtlasRelease property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the principalPhysicsGroup property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the physicsShort property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the generatorName property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the geometryVersion property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the conditionsTag property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the generatorTune property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the amiStatus property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the beamType property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the productionStep property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the projectName property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the statsAlgorithm property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the genFilterNames property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the file_type property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the sample_name property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the logicalDatasetName property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the campaign property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved string value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the keywords property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved vector of strings.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the weights property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved vector of strings.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the keyword property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved vector of strings.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the fileGUID property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved vector of strings (GUIDs).
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the events property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved vector of integers.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the run_number property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved vector of integers.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the fileSize property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved vector of doubles.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the inputrange property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved map of int to int.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the inputfiles property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved map of int to string.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the LFN property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved map of string to int.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the misc property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved map of string to weights_t.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the config property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved map of string to string.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Static getter for the sum_of_weights property.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the retrieved double value.
Pointer to the meta instance.

briefdescription.para: Creates a directory path, including parent directories if needed.

parameterdescription.para: The directory path to create.

briefdescription.para: Deletes a directory path and its contents.

parameterdescription.para: The directory path to delete.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a path refers to an existing file.

parameterdescription.para: The path to check.

simplesect.para: True if the path is a file and exists, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Renames a file or directory.

parameterdescription.para: The original path.
The new path.

briefdescription.para: Converts a relative path to an absolute path.

parameterdescription.para: The path to convert.

simplesect.para: The absolute version of the path.

briefdescription.para: Lists files in a directory, optionally filtered by extension.

parameterdescription.para: The directory to search.
File extension filter. If empty, all files are listed.

simplesect.para: A vector of filenames in the directory.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with standard precision.

parameterdescription.para: The double value to convert.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with specified precision.

parameterdescription.para: The double value to convert.
The number of decimal places to consider.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Replaces all occurrences of a substring in a string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to modify.
The substring to replace.
The replacement string.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string contains a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.
The substring to search for.

simplesect.para: True if the substring is found, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string ends with a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.
The substring to check for at the end.

simplesect.para: True if the string ends with the substring, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a vector of strings contains a specific string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the vector to search.
The string to search for.

simplesect.para: True if the string is found in the vector, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Empties a vector and all objects it points to.

parameterdescription.para: The type of pointers in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to empty.

inbodydescription.para: < Loop through all elements in the vector.
< Delete the object the pointer points to.
< Set the pointer to nullptr to avoid dangling pointers.
< Clear the vector.

briefdescription.para: Fills a vector with pointers from another vector based on a selection index.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects being pointed to.
Pointer to the output vector to fill.
Pointer to the source vector to select from.
Pointer to a vector of indices for selection.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the output vector.
< Reserve space for the output elements.
< Loop through each selected index.
< Get the object at the selected index.
< Add it to the output vector.
< Mark the object as in use.

briefdescription.para: Extracts a specific property from a vector of objects into a new vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects in the source vector.
The type of the property to extract.
Pointer to the output vector to fill with property values.
Pointer to the source vector of objects.
Function pointer to extract the property from an object.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the properties vector.
< Reserve space for the property values.
< Loop through each object in the source vector.
< Create a default-initialized property variable.
< Call the provided function to extract the property.
< Add the property value to the output vector.

briefdescription.para: Prefix used in log messages from this instance. Initialized as empty string.
Flag indicating whether debug mode is enabled. Initialized as false.
Flag indicating whether warnings are suppressed. Initialized as false.
Flag indicating whether info messages are suppressed. Initialized as false.
Provides properties and methods for metadata management.

detaileddescription.para: The meta class inherits from tools (providing utility functions) and notification (providing logging/messaging capabilities). It offers a comprehensive interface for handling various metadata attributes such as event numbers, cross-sections, dataset information, and other parameters crucial for physics analysis. It supports reading metadata from ROOT files and JSON sources.
